title: viola suavis var. adriatica
intro: Viola suavis var. adriatica, also known as the Adriatic sweet violet, is a perennial flowering plant in the viola genus. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Viola suavis var. adriatica include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Viola suavis var. adriatica include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
